category_sources: Official openMSX documentation describes the openMSX manual for the emulator.
source_facts.description says openMSX is an MSX emulator.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is openmsx; official website and repository style the project as openMSX.
docs_sources: Official openMSX website has a Documentation page and user manual.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/openMSX/openMSX, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies an MSX emulator; official openMSX manual supports emulator and MSX tagging.
